title: Question: Error on indexing the multiple dimensional array (MDA)

features.name: non_power_of_2_mda_out_of_bounds_index
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array with non-power-of-2 dimensions accessed with an out-of-bounds index variable
features.snippet: int A [7][1]; int a[1]; always_ff @(posedge clk) a <= A[i];
